summary: A Go-based validation and migration tool integrating with Claude Desktop via MCP to run assertions and migrate Goss configurations.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged) during active MCP feature development
Archived session metadata suggests unstable or evolving MCP extension design
Heavy reliance on internal packages may limit external plugin extensibility
suggestions: Commit or stash the working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
Stabilize the MCP server API before expanding Claude Desktop integration
Increase test coverage for the new MCP handlers
Document the plugin architecture given the separate plugins/ directory
